title: Per-Origin Politeness, Token Timing, Retry Budgets, and Fairness
description: A shared ticker spaces starts globally, one origin monopolizes slots, Retry-After is ignored, jitter is unbounded, and transient failures retry forever. Learners cumulatively produce monotonic per-origin eligibility scheduler through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Track per-origin active requests, last start, next eligibility, request and byte budgets, robots state, and owner override.
Enforce minimum spacing between request starts with monotonic time and avoid holding shared locks while sleeping.
Classify transport and HTTP failures by method safety, response evidence, attempt, elapsed, and crawl budgets.
